latestEntry.notes: Week 5 Day 4 of Talk 4. Career & Professional focus: Apply 5 Notions of Practical Thought (Simplify, Numerical Fluency, Invert, Study Basics, Lollapalooza Effects) to workplace and career decisions. 5 case snapshots: New Coke fiasco, Netflix Qwikster, manager promotion mistake, See's Candies acquisition, founder-consultant misalignment. 5 Notions Checklist for career decisions, commitment exercise.
